columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The time when the log entry was generated

columns.name: TypeName
columns.description: The specific type name of the detection

columns.name: ObjectName
columns.description: Name of the detected object

columns.name: ObjectTypeName
columns.description: Type name of the detected object

columns.name: OccurTime
columns.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the detection occurred

columns.name: DisplayName
columns.description: Human-readable display name of the detection

columns.name: Responses
columns.description: Array of response actions taken for the detection

columns.name: ObjectHashSha1
columns.description: SHA1 hash of the detected object

columns.name: SeverityLevel
columns.description: Severity level of the detection

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Category classification of the detection

columns.name: ObjectUrl
columns.description: URL reference to the detected object

columns.name: Uuid
columns.description: Unique identifier for the detection

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connector Friendly Name assigned during connector setup

columns.name: ProductIds
columns.description: ESET product selected for this connector instance (EP, EI, or ECOS)

columns.name: Circumstances
columns.description: Circumstances surrounding the detection (v2 direct field, v1 nested in context.circumstances)

columns.name: UserName
columns.description: Username associated with the detection (v2 direct field, v1 nested in context.userName)

columns.name: Device
columns.description: Device object with displayName and uuid (v2 API only)

columns.name: Email
columns.description: Email object with attachments, headers, sender, recipient (v2 API only)

columns.name: File
columns.description: File object with path, hashes, size (v2 API only)

columns.name: NetworkTraffic
columns.description: Network traffic object with source/destination details (v2 API only)

columns.name: Process
columns.description: Process object with commandLine, path, uuid (v2 API only)

columns.name: NetworkCommunication
columns.description: Network communication details (v1 API)

columns.name: DetectionUuid
columns.description: Detection UUID (mapped from uuid for compatibility)

columns.name: Context
columns.description: Context information about the detection (v1 API)

columns.name: GroupSize
columns.description: Number of similar detections grouped together

columns.name: SeverityScore
columns.description: Severity score as string for backward compatibility. DEPRECATED: for SeverityScoreInt

columns.name: SeverityScoreInt
columns.description: Severity score as integer (correct API type)

columns.name: DeviceDisplayName
columns.description: Display name of the device (v2: device.displayName object; v1: not available in payload)

columns.name: DeviceUuid
columns.description: UUID of the device (v2: device.uuid object; v1: context.deviceUuid)

columns.name: UserNameBase
columns.description: Base username associated with the detection

columns.name: ProcessPath
columns.description: Path of the process involved (v2 direct field, v1 nested in context.process.path)

columns.name: ProcessUuid
columns.description: UUID of the process

columns.name: ProcessCommandline
columns.description: Process command line

columns.name: ObjectSizeBytes
columns.description: Size of the detected object in bytes as integer for backward compatibility. DEPRECATED: for ObjectSizeBytesString

columns.name: ObjectSizeBytesString
columns.description: Size of the detected object in bytes as string (correct API type)

columns.name: EdrRuleUuid
columns.description: EDR rule UUID that triggered the detection

columns.name: Note
columns.description: Additional notes about the detection

columns.name: Resolved
columns.description: Whether the detection has been resolved

columns.name: CloudOfficeTenantUuid
columns.description: Cloud office tenant UUID

columns.name: ScanUuid
columns.description: Scan session UUID

columns.name: TriggeringEvent
columns.description: Event that triggered the detection
